flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Pierce College District vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.5k vs 6.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pierce College District rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $5.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pierce College District rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $6.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Pierce College District fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (6.4k → 5.3k).
